name: Shrimp and Shells Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine chopped peppers, sliced zucchini, scallions, dill weed, and parsley with the cooked shrimp and shell pasta.
2. Drizzle lemon juice over the salad mixture.
3. Mix in the mayonnaise until everything is evenly coated.
4. Garnish with cherry tomatoes.
